HomePage.title: Strategic Collaboration in Electronics
HomePage.subtitle: Strategic partnerships and technology consulting for advanced electronics and semiconductor industries.

features.search_desc: Technical finder with predictive part matches.

AboutPage.label: Swiss engineering precision
AboutPage.description:
At brückenbauer GmbH, we build bridges - between disciplines, sectors and borders.
Based in Switzerland since 2022, we combine extensive experience at the intersection of politics, administration, business, and innovation. Thanks to a broad network, we connect local expertise with a global perspective and support our clients in mastering complex challenges and unlocking new potential.
We connect, design and empower.

services.label: Services
services.title: Strategic and operational support
services.srv_01_copy: We support or manage projects that are geared towards achieving clear goals, and we provide our clients with sound advice.
services.srv_02_copy: We facilitate cooperation with authorities, business partners or other relevant bodies and efficiently bring together complex interests.
services.srv_03_copy: We identify growth opportunities, develop business models and support our clients in fully realizing their potential.
services.srv_04_copy: In the short term and for a defined period, we supplement our customers' teams with our know-how to bridge resource gaps or to successfully complete projects.

team.label: Leadership node
team.title: The Bridge Builders
team.subtitle: A dynamic duo whose skills complement each other.

andreas.bio_1: Andreas Werthmüller is a practice-oriented expert with extensive experience across interdisciplinary and intercultural environments. Combining strategic thinking with operational execution, he brings deep expertise in research, technology, innovation, and stakeholder management.
andreas.bio_2: Over the course of his career, Andreas has successfully led and coordinated numerous international programs and projects in both the public and private sectors. As an experienced PMO and project leader, he supports organizations in navigating complex challenges and transforming ideas into sustainable, long-term results.
andreas.bio_3: His approach is pragmatic, solution-driven, and strongly focused on creating measurable impact through effective collaboration and structured execution.

konstantin.bio_1: Konstantin Gochua is a business development and product management professional with extensive international experience in semiconductors, microelectronics, and advanced materials. His background combines deep technical expertise with customer-oriented business strategy, enabling him to bridge the gap between engineering, innovation, and commercial growth.
konstantin.bio_2: Throughout his career, Konstantin has contributed to semiconductor innovation, RFID technologies, power electronics, and international business development while supporting strategic partnerships and cross-functional collaboration in highly technical industries.
konstantin.bio_3: With a strong foundation in applied research and industrial innovation, Konstantin brings an analytical, adaptable, and internationally minded approach to complex technological and business challenges.

sequence.label: Operating sequence
sequence.title: From need definition to long-term support
sequence.step_1_copy: We support you in defining your needs and help you finding means and ways to implement your strategy and achieve your goals.
sequence.step_2_copy: We will create a detailed roadmap that includes all phases of the project and the measures to be implemented.
sequence.step_3_copy: We provide the necessary support and all related elements. We also advise you on your long-term strategy.

IndustriesPage.label: Application sectors
IndustriesPage.title: Application Sectors
IndustriesPage.description: Electronic components for every application - reliable, versatile, and individually developed. From idea to series production, we deliver the right components for every application. As a reliable distributor of high-quality electronic components, we offer more than an extensive portfolio. We understand the requirements of diverse industries and support our customers with suitable solutions - quickly, competently, and with maximum supply reliability.

ProductsPage.label: Component Portfolio 2025
ProductsPage.title: Product Groups
ProductsPage.description: Upper-category archive from the component portfolio. Select a dossier group to inspect product-level parts, imagery, and technical metadata.

ProductDescriptions.temperature-sensors: Engineered for extreme precision and harsh environments, our temperature sensing assemblies guarantee reliable thermal management. The portfolio includes high-performance NTCs, thermistors, and thermocouples designed for industrial automation and automotive applications.
ProductDescriptions.electromagnetic-compatibility-emc: Safeguard your electronic infrastructure against interference with our premium EMC solutions. Our comprehensive range of chokes, filters, and inductors ensures stable electromagnetic behavior and strict compliance with global standards.
ProductDescriptions.power-management: Maximize efficiency and operational safety with our advanced power management components. From robust IGBT and SiC modules to reliable MOSFETs and power supplies, we empower high-load industrial systems and renewable energy applications.
ProductDescriptions.passives: The foundation of stable circuitry, our passive components offer unmatched reliability under continuous stress. Discover our extensive selection of resistors, MLCC capacitors, and precision quartz timing components for high-end electronics.
ProductDescriptions.electromechanics: Bridging electrical control with robust mechanical execution, our electromechanical components are built for longevity. We supply durable connectors, ventilation hardware, and custom interface solutions that keep complex systems running seamlessly.
ProductDescriptions.acoustics: Ensure clear auditory signaling and feedback with our high-fidelity acoustic components. Our specialized buzzers, microphones, and magnetic transducers deliver superior sound performance for medical, industrial, and consumer applications.
ProductDescriptions.pressure-and-flow-sensors: Delivering uncompromising accuracy in fluid and gas measurement, our pressure and flow sensors ensure optimal system control. Featuring advanced pressure transmitters, ultrasonic flow meters, and robust telemetry solutions for critical infrastructure.
ProductDescriptions.current-and-position-sensors: Enable precise motion control and energy monitoring with our industrial-grade sensing platforms. We offer high-accuracy clamp-on current sensors, rotary encoders, and potentiometers tailored for demanding mechanical systems.

ProductShortDescriptions.temperature-sensors: NTC, thermistor, thermocouple, and custom high-temperature sensing assemblies.
ProductShortDescriptions.electromagnetic-compatibility-emc: Chokes, filters, inductors, and transformers for controlled electromagnetic behavior.
ProductShortDescriptions.power-management: IGBT, SiC, MOSFET, converter, and power supply components for engineered systems.
ProductShortDescriptions.passives: Resistors, capacitors, MLCC packages, and quartz timing components.
ProductShortDescriptions.electromechanics: Connectors, cables, ventilation, card readers, sockets, and wireless interface hardware.
ProductShortDescriptions.acoustics: Buzzers, microphones, receivers, speakers, piezos, and magnetic acoustic transducers.
ProductShortDescriptions.pressure-and-flow-sensors: Pressure transmitters, ultrasonic flow meters, gas sensors, gauges, and level telemetry.
ProductShortDescriptions.current-and-position-sensors: Clamp-on current sensing and rotary, encoder, and potentiometer position platforms.

MetaData.title: brückenbauer GmbH: We don't just advise
